calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad appeared by zoom for and with Heddy Pilpel (trustee) by zoom.
Sylvia Pilpel appeared by zoom in propria persona.
David Pilpel appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that it read David Pilpel's declaration and that although it was framed as an opposition, it does not seem to be an opposition to the subject matter. Mr. Pilpel presented oral objections, stated that he believes he is a beneficiary and that he is entitled to notice, that he does not have the resources to obtain counsel, requested a continuance and stated that he would like to see an updated schedule. Mr. Melbostad stated that there is no new asset schedule associated with the 2010 amendment, that he did not obtain any additional information regarding the accounts, that Wealth Minerals is not an account it is a brokerage service and can be taken off of the order, and that according to David, the majority of the assets were liquidated. The court stated that it does not see how it can transfer some of the accounts without having more information/history about them. Mr. Melbostad stated that he understands, that the main asset is the Morgan Stanley account, asked the court to at least approve that account and stated that they will figure out the rest. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Continued To Jul-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
